name: Elite Hacker: Retro Hacking Evolution: Grand Theft Transsexual Uplink Matrix Terminator SEO Words
short_description: Do you ever lay awake at night thinking about Zero Cool wearing the dress?
detailed_description:
The Basics

Elite Hacker: Retro Hacking Evolution is a command prompt style text based online hacking simulator. Take on paid jobs, crack passwords, buy upgrades, and chomp on estrogen like it's candy all while looking cute in your programmer socks (estrogen and socks not included).

Controls

Use your keyboard to type letters and numbers and also other characters.

Saving

The game saves automatically.

Modifying

You get the source code for the game with the game. It's mostly written in PHP and the scripts are unobfuscated. Openly readable and modifiable.
